title: Sendinblue vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
